title: DHS — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Department of Homeless Services (DHS) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the DHS Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/dhs, and the NYC311 street-outreach channel. Includes the NYC geography spine (Community Board, Council District, NTA, BBL/BIN, Census Tract) and DHS's shelter facility-type vocabulary.

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine shared across DHS datasets — the join keys back to the rest of city government.

communityBoard.description: Community District / Board (Open Data 'Community Board' / 'Community District' / 'Community Districts').

nta.description: Neighborhood Tabulation Area name or code ('NTA').

FacilityType.description: DHS shelter/facility census category, drawn from the Individual Census and Buildings datasets.

Population.description: DHS client-population grouping used across the census and intake reports.
